title: BattINFO Ingest Manifest
description: Contract for battinfo.ingest.json, the folder-local manifest that drives typed instance ingest.

resource_type.description: Typed ingest subject. Additional values may be introduced in future schema revisions.

type_record.description: Path to the curated reusable type record that this instance points to.

resource_iri.description: Optional existing canonical IRI to preserve for the ingested resource.

resource_name.description: Human-facing instance label used as the default serial/name in generated records.

workspace_id.description: Registry workspace id used when bundling or publishing.

publisher_id.description: Publisher id used when bundling or publishing.

source_version.description: Submission source version written into the generated workspace/package.

license.description: Default dataset license applied to generated dataset records.

photo_glob.description: Glob or ordered glob list used to discover photo datasets under the ingest root.

timeseries_glob.description: Glob or ordered glob list used to discover CSV-backed timeseries datasets under the ingest root.

test_kind_from_filename.description: Lowercase filename token to BattINFO test kind mapping used during CSV inference.
